category_sources: source_facts.description identifies the Python programming language; official Python docs describe free-threaded CPython builds with the GIL disabled.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is python-freethreading; official Python docs use the term free threading for this CPython build.
docs_sources: Official Python documentation has a dedicated Python support for free threading HOWTO and the main Python 3 documentation.
repo_sources: Official CPython repository README lists source code as https://github.com/python/cpython and documentation as docs.python.org.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables include python3.14t; official Python free-threading docs describe CPython builds with the GIL disabled.
